idea-plugin.name: No-Globals IDE Support
idea-plugin.description: Enables IntelliJ-side support for one.wabbit kotlin-no-globals projects by allowing the Kotlin IDE plugin to load the external compiler plugin registrar from imported compiler arguments.
idea-plugin.change-notes: 0.1.1: fixes the Gradle-plugin release validation path and keeps IDE support aligned with the published helper/runtime setup.

action.description: Re-scan Kotlin compiler arguments and enable no-globals IDE support for this project session.
